mapper.select: SELECT C.DESCRIPTION AS description , AVG(D.ANSWER_SCORE) AS score FROM ( SELECT RESPONSE_ID , SURVEY_ID , USER_ID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY USER_ID, SURVEY_ID ORDER BY REG_DT DESC ) AS RN FROM TBL_USER_SURVEY_RESPONSE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ) A JOIN TBL_SURVEY B ON A.SURVEY_ID = B.SURVEY_ID JOIN TBL_SURVEY_QUESTION C ON B.SURVEY_ID = C.SURVEY_ID JOIN TBL_SURVEY_ANSWER D ON A.RESPONSE_ID = D.RESPONSE_ID AND C.QUESTION_ID = D.QUESTION_ID JOIN TBL_SURVEY_OPTION E ON D.SELECTED_OPTION_ID = E.OPTION_ID WHERE A.RN = 1 AND B.SURVEY_TYPE_CODE = 'RISK_PROFILE' GROUP BY C.DESCRIPTION
